terminal_capabilities_packet_t(3) Library Functions Manual terminal_capabilities_packet_t(3)

NAME

terminal_capabilities_packet_t - Terminal capabilities packet structure (Packet Type 5).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/packet/packet.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t capabilities
Terminal capabilities bitmask (TERM_CAP_* flags). uint32_t color_level
Color level enum value (terminal_color_mode_t). uint32_t color_count
Actual color count (16, 256, or 16777216). uint32_t render_mode
Render mode enum value (foreground/background/half-block). uint16_t width
Terminal width in characters. uint16_t height
Terminal height in characters. char term_type [32]
$TERM environment variable value (for debugging) char colorterm [32]
$COLORTERM environment variable value (for debugging) uint8_t detection_reliable
Detection reliability flag (1=reliable detection, 0=best guess). uint32_t utf8_support
UTF-8 support flag (0=no UTF-8, 1=UTF-8 supported). uint32_t palette_type
Palette type enum value (palette_type_t). char palette_custom [64]
Custom palette characters (if palette_type == PALETTE_CUSTOM). uint8_t desired_fps
Client's desired frame rate (1-144 FPS). uint8_t color_filter
Monochromatic color filter enum value (color_filter_t). uint8_t wants_padding
Whether client wants frame padding (1=padding enabled, 0=no padding for snapshot/piped modes). uint32_t codec_capabilities_video
Video codec capabilities bitmask (VIDEO_CODEC_CAP_*). uint32_t codec_capabilities_audio
Audio codec capabilities bitmask (AUDIO_CODEC_CAP_*).

Detailed Description

Terminal capabilities packet structure (Packet Type 5).

Sent by client to server to report terminal capabilities, dimensions, color support, rendering preferences, and supported codecs for optimal frame delivery.

Definition at line 1018 of file packet.h.

Field Documentation
